mapper.select: /* CHAT 대화방 목록 조회 ai.chatbot.selectChatRoomList */ SELECT A.ROOM_ID AS ROOM_ID , A.ROOM_TITLE AS TITLE , A.CREATE_USER_ID AS USER_ID , A.CREATE_DT AS CREATE_DT , A.LAST_CHAT_DT AS LAST_CHAT_DT , A.FIX_YN AS FIX_YN FROM TB_CHAT_ROOM A WHERE 1=1 AND A.CREATE_USER_ID = #{userId} ORDER BY A.FIX_YN = 'Y' DESC, A.LAST_CHAT_DT DESC

/* 모델 목록 조회 ai.chatbot.selectModelList */ SELECT A.MODEL_ID AS VALUE , A.MODEL_NAME AS LABEL , A.PROVIDER_ID , A.VERSION , A.INPUT_COST , A.OUTPUT_COST , A.USE_YN , A.DESCRIPTION , A.SORT_ORDER , A.CREATE_DT , A.MODIFY_DT FROM TB_LLM_MDL A ORDER BY A.SORT_ORDER
/* RAG 데이터 목록 조회 ai.chatbot.selectRagDsList */ SELECT A.DATASET_ID AS VALUE , B.DS_NM AS LABEL FROM TB_AGT_DS A INNER JOIN TB_DS B ON B.DATASET_ID = A.DATASET_ID GROUP BY A.DATASET_ID
/* 데이터마트 조회 ai.chatbot.selectDmList */ SELECT A.DATAMART_ID AS VALUE , B.DM_NM AS LABEL FROM TB_AGT_DM A INNER JOIN TB_DM B ON B.DATAMART_ID = A.DATAMART_ID GROUP BY A.DATAMART_ID
mapper.insert: /* CHAT 대화방 등록 ai.chatbot.insertChatRoom */ INSERT INTO TB_CHAT_ROOM (ROOM_TITLE, CREATE_USER_ID, CREATE_DT, LAST_CHAT_DT) VALUES (#{roomTitle}, #{userId}, NOW(), NOW())

/* 공유 토큰 등록 ai.chatbot.insertShareToken — EXPIRED_DT: NOW() + 3일 */ INSERT INTO TB_SHARE_TOKEN (SHARE_TOKEN, ROOM_ID, CRTR_ID, CREATE_DT, EXPIRED_DT) VALUES ( #{shareToken}, #{roomId}, #{userId}, NOW(), DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL 3 DAY) )

/* CHAT 대화방 로그 등록 ai.chatbot.insertChatLog */ INSERT INTO TB_CHAT_LOG ( ROOM_ID, SVC_TY, REF_ID, Q_CONTENT, R_CONTENT, IN_TOKENS, OUT_TOKENS, SATIS_YN, TTSQ, TABLE_DATA, REASK_CNT, CREATE_USER_ID, CREATE_DT ) VALUES ( #{roomId}, #{svcTy}, #{refId}, #{qContent}, #{rContent}, #{inTokens}, #{outTokens}, #{satisYn}, #{sql}, #{tableData}, #{reaskCnt}, #{userId}, NOW() )

/* CHAT 대화방 참조 등록 ai.chatbot.insertChatRef */ INSERT INTO TB_CHAT_REF ( LOG_ID, DOC_FILE_ID, MAIN_PAGE_NO, RELATED_PAGES, CREATE_DT ) VALUES ( #{logId}, #{docFileId}, #{mainPageNo}, #{relatedPages}, NOW() )
mapper.select: /* CHAT 대화방 로그 목록 조회 ai.chatbot.selectChatLogList */ SELECT A.LOG_ID , A.ROOM_ID , A.SVC_TY , A.REF_ID , A.Q_CONTENT , A.R_CONTENT , A.IN_TOKENS , A.OUT_TOKENS , A.SATIS_YN , A.SATIS_CONTENT , A.SATIS_DT , A.TABLE_DATA , A.TTSQ , A.REASK_CNT , A.CREATE_USER_ID , A.CREATE_DT , (SELECT MIN(D.DOC_ID) FROM TB_CHAT_REF R INNER JOIN TB_DOC_FILE D ON D.DOC_FILE_ID = R.DOC_FILE_ID AND D.USE_YN = 'Y' WHERE R.LOG_ID = A.LOG_ID) AS DOC_ID , CASE WHEN A.SVC_TY = 'M' AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM TB_CHAT_REF R2 WHERE R2.LOG_ID = A.LOG_ID) THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS DOC_EXIST , CASE WHEN A.TTSQ IS NOT NULL AND A.TABLE_DATA IS NOT NULL THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS TABLE_EXIST FROM TB_CHAT_LOG A WHERE 1=1 AND A.ROOM_ID = #{roomId} ORDER BY A.CREATE_DT DESC

/* CHAT 대화방 참조 문서 목록 조회 ai.chatbot.selectChatDocList */ SELECT A.DOC_FILE_ID , A.DOC_ID , A.FILE_NAME , A.FILE_PATH , B.MAIN_PAGE_NO , B.RELATED_PAGES FROM TB_DOC_FILE A INNER JOIN TB_CHAT_REF B ON B.DOC_FILE_ID = A.DOC_FILE_ID AND B.LOG_ID = #{logId} WHERE 1=1 AND A.USE_YN = 'Y'

/* CHAT 대화방 tableData 조회 ai.chatbot.selectTableDataList */ SELECT A.LOG_ID , A.ROOM_ID , A.SVC_TY , A.REF_ID , A.Q_CONTENT , A.R_CONTENT , A.IN_TOKENS , A.OUT_TOKENS , A.SATIS_YN , A.TTSQ , A.REASK_CNT , A.CREATE_USER_ID , A.CREATE_DT , A.TABLE_DATA FROM TB_CHAT_LOG A WHERE 1=1 AND A.LOG_ID = #{logId}

/* 채팅 로그 단건 조회 ai.chatbot.selectChatLogByLogId */ SELECT A.LOG_ID , A.ROOM_ID , A.SVC_TY , A.REF_ID , A.Q_CONTENT , A.R_CONTENT , A.TTSQ , A.TABLE_DATA , A.CREATE_USER_ID AS USER_ID , A.CREATE_DT FROM TB_CHAT_LOG A WHERE 1=1 AND A.LOG_ID = #{logId}
mapper.insert: /* 지식 카드 등록 ai.chatbot.insertKnowledgeCard */ INSERT INTO TB_KNOW_CARD ( CARD_ID, USER_ID, CATEGORY_ID, LOG_ID, SVC_TY, TITLE, TAGS, PIN_YN, ARCHIVE_YN, ARCHIVE_DT, SORT_ORD, SQL_CODE, USE_YN, CREATE_DT, MODIFY_DT ) VALUES ( #{cardId}, #{userId}, #{categoryId}, #{logId}, #{svcTy}, #{title}, #{tags, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{pinYn}, #{archiveYn}, #{archiveDt, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{sortOrd, jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{sqlCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{useYn}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.select: /* 지식 카테고리 목록 조회 ai.chatbot.selectKnowledgeList */ SELECT A.CATEGORY_ID , A.USER_ID , A.CATEGORY_NM , A.COLOR , A.SORT_ORD , A.CREATE_DT FROM TB_KNOW_CAT A WHERE 1=1 AND A.USER_ID = #{userId} ORDER BY A.SORT_ORD
